creator: wolman@cs.washington.edu
text:
I have created a patch which upgrades the tcl83 port from version
8.3.1 to 8.3.2.  This patch combines the work done in PR#23306,
and the fix submitted in PR#24207.  In addition, it contains another
bug fix that allows the ical-2.2 port to be upgraded from tcl82 to
tcl83.

The tcl port maintainer has been silent on the previously mentioned
PR's for a long time, so it would be nice if this patch could be
committed.

You can download the patch from:
http://www.cs.washington.edu/homes/wolman/patches/tcl832.patch


